rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion for the same reasons: dated/limited C++ experience and no demonstrated industrial cybersecurity (SDL, IEC 62443) expertise for a role explicitly seeking those. Neither evaluation references the candidate's career gap, location (Berlin), or any demographic signal in its reasoning. The 1-point score difference (4 vs 3) and the reworded concerns/strengths fall within ordinary run-to-run noise rather than reflecting any penalty tied to the changed detail.
